name: claude-skill-analyze-js
description: A Claude Code skill that performs static analysis on JavaScript files to find API endpoints, URLs, secrets, emails, and file references. Supports TOON format output (50% smaller than JSON) optimized for LLM consumption. Use with /analyze-js in Claude Code.
